Jacob Gerritsz Cuyp

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
The Shepherdess
by Jacob Gerritsz Cuyp
Dutch Golden Age · 1628
A shepherdess seated with her crook and lamb in a rocky landscape — a quiet image by Aelbert Cuyp's father, a portrait-painter branching briefly into pastoral.
←Cupisnique Greek, Ptolemaic; minted in Cyprus→
